data.title: Trident Resources starts 10,000m winter drilling at Contact Lake Gold Project in Saskatchewan. Goal: confirm gold mineralization, expand zones & test new targets. TSX-V: ROCK, OTCQB: TRDTF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 15, 2026, Trident Resources Corp. (TSX-V:  ROCK) (OTCQB: TRDTF) has begun a winter diamond drilling program covering 10,000 meters at the Contact Lake Gold Project in northern Saskatchewan's La Ronge Gold Belt. The program's objectives include verifying past gold mineralization findings, enlarging established gold zones, and evaluating new targets identified through current geological analyses.

data.title: Amplifon named global Top Employer 2026, one of 17 worldwide, showcasing HR management excellence across Switzerland, India, China, and Asia-Pacific.
data.description: In 2026, a total of 17 companies globally were distinguished for their exceptional human resources management practices. This accreditation, a first for the Asia-Pacific region, adds to existing recognitions in Europe, North America, and Latin America. Countries such as Switzerland, India, and China were among those included in this prestigious list.

data.title: Novo Nordisk Foundation grants DKK 5.5 billion (EUR 736 million) to BioInnovation Institute to boost innovation in Europe.
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on January 15, 2026, the Novo Nordisk Foundation announced the allocation of a substantial amount of funding to the BioInnovation Institute (BII), totaling up to DKK 5.5 billion (EUR 736 million). This significant investment aims to support BII's initiatives in life sciences and deep tech innovation, allowing for the institute's expansion and further advancements in the field.

data.title: DeFi protocols opt for ticketed help desks and live support as scams flood Discord channels, numbers show.
data.description: Customer support methods at major DeFi protocols are being revamped, with ticketed help desks and live support services taking the place of constantly available Discord channels. This shift aims to enhance the quality and efficiency of assistance provided to users within the DeFi space.

data.title: STARTRADER sponsors UAE National Cricket Team for ICC 2026 T20 World Cup; partnership renewed; tourney begins Feb 7.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 15, 2026, STARTRADER, an international broker, reveals a fresh collaboration with the UAE Men's National Cricket Team for the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 starting on February 7, 2026. Under the agreement, STARTRADER's branding will...

data.title: Ericsson plans staff cuts in Sweden, aiming to enhance competitiveness. Global cost-saving measures in progress.
data.description: In Stockholm on January 15, 2026, Ericsson (NASDAQ: ERIC) disclosed plans to reduce its workforce in Sweden as a strategic move to enhance the company's competitiveness. This reduction forms part of a larger global effort to enhance cost efficiency. The exact number of staff members expected to be affected by the reduction has not been specified.

data.title: Munich launches ReMuc – "Ois im Kreis" project for reusable food containers by Relevo from Duni Group. Circular initiative takes step towards sustainable future.
data.description: In an effort to promote sustainability, the city of Munich in Germany has initiated the ReMuc – "Ois im Kreis" project, aimed at creating a circular economy. Spearheaded by Relevo, a company owned mostly by Duni, the project introduces a digital system for reusable food containers. This marks a significant advancement towards reducing waste and encouraging eco-friendly practices in Munich.

data.title: ARK ETFs impacted by Q4 crypto decline, Coinbase top detractor, highlights close tie to digital assets.
data.description: In the last quarter, a decrease in the crypto market revealed the increasing correlation between ARK's primary ETFs and digital assets. This downturn was primarily influenced by Coinbase and Roblox, which were the leading factors affecting performance.

data.title: Trump won't remove Powell as Federal Reserve chair during DOJ probe. Considering Kevin Warsh or Kevin Hassett as replacements.
data.description: President Trump has confirmed that he will not be firing Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell, despite an ongoing federal investigation. In an interview with Reuters, Trump mentioned that the administration is currently undecided on its next steps regarding Powell, but hinted at considering either former Fed Governor Kevin Warsh or National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett as potential replacements. He ruled out U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for the position. The President stated that it is too early to provide further details and indicated that the situation is in a holding pattern. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.
